The Proposal: -

The Assistant Administrative Officer, Group-B (Gazetted) Cadre at the establishment of Directorate of Geology and Mines, Nagpur, 02 candidates have been shortlisted by the Maharashtra Public Service Commission under reference No. The recommendation was made to the government under letter 2 here. Among the candidates, Shrikant Awhad did not accept the appointment. 4 here. The Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal Bench, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, had quashed Mr Awhad's appointment and ordered the appointment of a waitlisted candidate. Accordingly, the No. According to the letter at 5, the Maharashtra Public Service Commission has recommended 01 candidate in the waiting list to the government. The appointment orders are being issued by the Maharashtra Public Service Commission subject to verification of documents / certificates of the recommended candidate by the concerned office as per the guidelines and prescribed provisions of the Commission.
